{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603222016416F95459D1419F5847DC6"}"},"total":142},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7615853262279230233","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"并且拯救遗憾的过程一点都没崩，反派和友方强度都在线，逻辑也合理，而且好多细节一看就知道作者不是云，是真的仔细研究过"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773207658,"group_id":"7606222799031503896","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111209250583"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7606222799031503896","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"97"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17734,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7615851926061433625","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"没有大毒，小毒暂时让我触雷的没有，节奏中偏上一点，很稳定，我看评论区有人说不够爽文，但是第一个世界就用了几个月从二级咒术师变特级已经很不错了，强度也不爆表影响观感，还有就是更的好快，一天十更[微笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773207539,"group_id":"7606222799031503896","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"明我长相忆","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N93wEqmIz16FC15IQ5osm0Y=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ba5678141a6c4e2893d9cf1e65b68613~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706811&x-signature=NH%2FdRRCUR6iRDdR3ihzkxcNydt0%3D","user_id":"111209250583","user_name":"余忆訾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111209250583","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7606222799031503896","book_info":{"abstract":"【新书刚开分，后续会涨】【前期主角成长较多】【半无敌】【系统存在感弱，只在重要剧情节点出现】
我穿越了，还被一个系统绑定。
系统说，我的任务是修正诸天万界的“意难平”。
开局就送我一张【生得术式觉醒卡】？还把我扔进了咒术回战？
看着眼前这个戴着墨镜的白毛DK。
对不起了，最强！你的能力我仿制一份！
【叮！恭喜宿主觉醒生得术式！】
从此，诸天万界画风突变。
当五条悟濒死之际，我直接出手：“不准走，给我回去当最强！”
当鬼舞辻无惨准备屑老板发言，我的领域直接展开！
当顶上战争艾斯即将被赤犬贯穿，我单手接下熔岩：“不好意思，此路不通。”
自来也、宇智波鼬、炼狱杏寿郎……所有遗憾，由我一手抹平！
我叫李舟，一个兴趣使然的……遗憾修正师！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o53d41904e110aa5555bfee39bcc0f94f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱吃午餐肉罐头","author_id":"","book_id":"7606222799031503896","book_name":"综漫：从咒回开始，我专治意难平","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7607002147049194008","read_count":"79159","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"347979"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"145","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,无敌,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o53d41904e110aa5555bfee39bcc0f94f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365801&x-signature=UgHytl5gdwv8%2BIYIwj6jUoxoB6g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"163178874413150","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"97"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603222016416F95459D1419F5847DC6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8
